projectDescription: A full-stack Solana dApp starter built with React, Mantine UI, Solana Wallet Adapter, TanStack Query, Jotai, React Router, and an Express API backend — powered by Nx monorepo tooling.
keyFeatures: React 18 frontend with Mantine UI v7 component library
Solana Wallet Adapter integration with multi-wallet support
Cluster management (devnet, testnet, localnet, custom RPC)
Account dashboard: SOL balance, token accounts, transaction history
TanStack Query for data fetching and cache management
Jotai atoms with localStorage persistence for cluster state
Express API backend with uptime endpoint and static file serving
Nx monorepo with separate web and api projects
publicApiSurface: useCluster() — access active cluster, switch clusters, get explorer URLs
ClusterProvider — context provider for Solana cluster state
useAnchorProvider() — returns an AnchorProvider for on-chain program interactions
useGetBalance({ address }) — query SOL balance for a public key
useGetSignatures({ address }) — query transaction signatures for a public key
useGetTokenAccounts({ address }) — query SPL token accounts (Token + Token-2022)
useRequestAirdrop({ address }) — mutation to request devnet/testnet SOL airdrop
useTransferSol({ address }) — mutation to send SOL to another address
GET /api/uptime — returns server uptime in seconds
pnpm dev:web / pnpm dev:api — start development servers
pnpm build:web / pnpm build:api — build for production
